# protonpass_item_login (Data Source)

Reads a specific Proton Pass login item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_item_login" "example" {
  item_id  = "item_id_here"
  share_id = "share_id_here"
}

output "username" {
  value = data.protonpass_item_login.example.username
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) Item ID.
- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) Email.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password.
- `title` (String) Title of the login item.
- `urls` (List of String) URLs.
- `username` (String) Username.
